title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Agility India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Agility India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Agility India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Hyderabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Agility India:
Agility India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Agility India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
